name: Gofore Oyj
summary: Gofore Oyj provides digitalisation consultancy services for private and public sector operators in Finland, Germany, Spain, and Estonia. The company engages in business design and transformation consulting; digital services design, build, and development; and maintenance and support partnership. It also engages in the management of digital change, service design, and software development, as well as provides cloud services utilisation and cloud capacity consulting services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tampere, Finland.
